case_title: BAN THUC BANG VS. NP APARTMENTS, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY BANG, BAN THUC AS TO DEFENDANT NP APARTMENTS, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. : JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.
